name: xpod-cli
description: Spec-aligned Xpod CLI guidance for Solid Pod resource operations, server administration, auth, and model-boundary reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Design and use the spec-aligned Xpod CLI
interface.longDescription: Guidance for maintaining the Xpod command surface around raw Pod resources, server administration, RDF/object/secret boundaries, standardized JSON output, and safe credential handling.
defaultPrompt: Use $xpod-cli to review this CLI change.
Check whether this Xpod command mixes Pod resource and model semantics.
